entries.content:
# Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

[package]
name = "sys_proof_nominal"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
data = { path = "../data" }

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Verus crate dependencies
#
# It is recommended to use the Verus release:
# https://github.com/verus-lang/verus/releases/tag/release/0.2026.01.23.1650a05
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
vstd = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057", default-features=false }
verus_builtin = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }
verus_builtin_macros = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }

[package.metadata.verus]
verify = true

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

# Verus hooks into rustc internals (rustc-dev, rustc_driver) which change
# nightly-to-nightly with no stability guarantees. The nightly date is pinned
# to match the Verus crate versions in Cargo.toml -- using a later nightly may
# cause compilation failures. If you update the Verus dependencies, update the
# nightly date to match.
# The rustc-dev and rust-src components are required for Verus verification;
# llvm-tools-preview is needed for microkit's no_std linking;
# rust-analyzer provides IDE support (code completion, type hints, etc.).

[toolchain]
channel = "nightly-2026-01-25"
components = [ "rustfmt", "rust-src", "rustc-dev", "llvm-tools-preview", "rust-analyzer" ]

# Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

# `make all` (or `make`) verifies the whole crate -- every property plus the
# shared, property-independent Commutativity VCs -- in one `cargo-verus
# verify`. `make <property>` runs `cargo-verus verify` on just that
# property's generated VCs (its vc_init / vc_sequential / vc_post_pre /
# vc_independence modules).

ENV_VARS = RUSTC_BOOTSTRAP=1

CARGO_FLAGS = -Z build-std=core,alloc,compiler_builtins \
              -Z build-std-features=compiler-builtins-mem \
              --target aarch64-unknown-none

# verify the entire crate (every property plus the shared Commutativity VCs)
.PHONY: all
all:
	$(ENV_VARS) cargo-verus verify $(CARGO_FLAGS)

# Compile every crate WITHOUT verification so the dependency crates (vstd,
# data, the GUMBO library crates) are cached as Verus import libraries before
# any per-property `--verify-module` run -- that flag is otherwise forwarded
# to the dependency crates too and fails on a clean build (see header note).
.PHONY: warm-deps
warm-deps:
	$(ENV_VARS) cargo-verus verify $(CARGO_FLAGS) -- --no-verify

# verify only property 'tc_req_01'
.PHONY: tc_req_01
tc_req_01: warm-deps
	$(ENV_VARS) cargo-verus verify $(CARGO_FLAGS) -- --verify-module tc_req_01::vc_init --verify-module tc_req_01::vc_sequential --verify-module tc_req_01::vc_post_pre --verify-module tc_req_01::vc_independence

# verify only property 'tc_req_02'
.PHONY: tc_req_02
tc_req_02: warm-deps
	$(ENV_VARS) cargo-verus verify $(CARGO_FLAGS) -- --verify-module tc_req_02::vc_init --verify-module tc_req_02::vc_sequential --verify-module tc_req_02::vc_post_pre --verify-module tc_req_02::vc_independence

.PHONY: clean
clean:
	cargo clean

# Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

export TOP_DIR := $(abspath $(dir ${MAKEFILE_LIST}))
export TOP_BUILD_DIR := $(abspath build)

# Optional configuration file. Usage: make CONFIG=monitor.mk
# Variables defined with ?= below (e.g. MICROKIT_CONFIG) can be
# overridden by exporting them from the config file.
ifdef CONFIG
include $(CONFIG)
endif

override MICROKIT_SDK := $(abspath ${MICROKIT_SDK})

# SYSTEM_MAKEFILE points to the makefile containing all compile/link rules.
# Override this only if you want to substitute an entirely different rule set
SYSTEM_MAKEFILE ?= system.mk

# By default we make a debug build so that the client debug prints can be seen.
export MICROKIT_CONFIG ?= debug

export CPU = cortex-a53
export QEMU = qemu-system-aarch64

export AR := ar
export CC := clang
export DTC := dtc
export LD := ld.lld
export RANLIB := llvm-ranlib

export CRATES_DIR := $(TOP_DIR)/crates

export TARGET := aarch64-none-elf

export MICROKIT_SDK := $(abspath $(MICROKIT_SDK))
export MICROKIT_TOOL := $(abspath $(MICROKIT_SDK)/bin/microkit)
export MICROKIT_BOARD_DIR := $(abspath $(MICROKIT_SDK)/board/$(MICROKIT_BOARD)/$(MICROKIT_CONFIG))

IMAGE_FILE := $(TOP_BUILD_DIR)/loader.img
REPORT_FILE := $(TOP_BUILD_DIR)/report.txt

# By default, cargo-verus is used to build Rust crates, and it fails if verification does not succeed.
# To skip verification, set the RUST_MAKE_TARGET environment variable to use a cargo build target.
# Example:
#
#   RUST_MAKE_TARGET=build-release make

all: ${IMAGE_FILE}

.PHONY: check_microkit
check_microkit:
	@if [ -z "$(strip $(MICROKIT_BOARD))" ]; then \
		echo "MICROKIT_BOARD must be specified"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi
	@if [ -z "$(strip $(MICROKIT_SDK))" ]; then \
		echo "MICROKIT_SDK must be specified"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi

${IMAGE_FILE}: check_microkit ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile FORCE
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} $(notdir $@)

qemu ${REPORT_FILE}: $(IMAGE_FILE)
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} $(notdir $@)

clean:: ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} clean

clobber:: clean
	rm -rf $(TOP_DIR)/build

${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile: $(SYSTEM_MAKEFILE)
	mkdir -p ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}
	cp $(SYSTEM_MAKEFILE) ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile

test:: ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} test

verus: ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} verus
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} verus-sys-proof

FORCE:

# Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

MICROKIT_TOOL ?= $(MICROKIT_SDK)/bin/microkit

CFLAGS := -mcpu=$(CPU) \
	-mstrict-align \
	-ffreestanding \
	-nostdlib \
	-g3 \
	-O3 \
	-Wall -Wno-unused-function -Werror -Wno-unused-command-line-argument \
	-I$(MICROKIT_BOARD_DIR)/include \
	-target $(TARGET)

LDFLAGS := -L$(MICROKIT_BOARD_DIR)/lib
LIBS := --start-group -lmicrokit -Tmicrokit.ld --end-group

MSD ?= microkit.system

IMAGES := tsp_tst.elf tsp_tst_MON.elf tcp_tct.elf tcp_tct_MON.elf fp_ft.elf fp_ft_MON.elf domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread.elf domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread_MON.elf pacer.elf
IMAGE_FILE = loader.img
REPORT_FILE = report.txt

UTIL_OBJS = printf.o util.o

TYPES_DIR = $(TOP_DIR)/types
TYPE_OBJS := $(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_Temperature_1.o $(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_FanCmd_1.o $(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_SetPoint_1.o $(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_FanAck_1.o

# exporting TOP_TYPES_INCLUDE in case other makefiles need it
export TOP_TYPES_INCLUDE = -I$(TYPES_DIR)/include

TOP_INCLUDE = $(TOP_TYPES_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/util/include

all: $(IMAGE_FILE)
	CHECK_FLAGS_BOARD_MD5:=.board_cflags-$(shell echo -- ${CFLAGS} ${MICROKIT_BOARD} ${MICROKIT_CONFIG}| shasum | sed 's/ *-//')

${CHECK_FLAGS_BOARD_MD5}:
	-rm -f .board_cflags-*
	touch $@

%.o: ${TOP_DIR}/util/src/%.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ -I$(TOP_DIR)/util/include

$(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_Temperature_1.o: $(TOP_DIR)/types/src/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_Temperature_1.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)


$(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_FanCmd_1.o: $(TOP_DIR)/types/src/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_FanCmd_1.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)


$(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_SetPoint_1.o: $(TOP_DIR)/types/src/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_SetPoint_1.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)


$(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_FanAck_1.o: $(TOP_DIR)/types/src/sb_queue_TempControl_SysVerif_FanAck_1.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)


# monitor
tsp_tst_MON.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/tsp_tst/src/tsp_tst_MON.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/tsp_tst/include

# user code
tsp_tst_user.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/tsp_tst/src/tsp_tst_user.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)/ -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/tsp_tst/include

tsp_tst.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/tsp_tst/src/tsp_tst.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/tsp_tst/include

# monitor
tcp_tct_MON.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/tcp_tct/src/tcp_tct_MON.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/tcp_tct/include

# user code
tcp_tct_user.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/tcp_tct/src/tcp_tct_user.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)/ -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/tcp_tct/include

tcp_tct.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/tcp_tct/src/tcp_tct.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/tcp_tct/include

# monitor
fp_ft_MON.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/fp_ft/src/fp_ft_MON.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/fp_ft/include

# user code
fp_ft_user.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/fp_ft/src/fp_ft_user.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)/ -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/fp_ft/include

fp_ft.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/fp_ft/src/fp_ft.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/fp_ft/include

# monitor
domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread_MON.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread/src/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread_MON.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread/include

# user code
domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread_rust:
	make -C ${CRATES_DIR}/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread $(RUST_MAKE_TARGET)

domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread/src/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread/include

pacer.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/pacer/src/pacer.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ -I$(TOP_INCLUDE)

tsp_tst_MON.elf: tsp_tst_MON.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

tsp_tst.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) tsp_tst_user.o tsp_tst.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

tcp_tct_MON.elf: tcp_tct_MON.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

tcp_tct.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) tcp_tct_user.o tcp_tct.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

fp_ft_MON.elf: fp_ft_MON.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

fp_ft.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) fp_ft_user.o fp_ft.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread_MON.elf: domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread_MON.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread_rust domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) -L ${CRATES_DIR}/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread/target/aarch64-unknown-none/release $(filter %.o, $^) $(LIBS) -ldomain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread -o $@

pacer.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) pacer.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

$(IMAGE_FILE): $(IMAGES) $(TOP_DIR)/$(MSD)
	xmllint --xinclude $(TOP_DIR)/$(MSD) | awk 'FNR==1{print; print "<!--"; print "  DO NOT EDIT: This file is generated by merging"; print "    $(TOP_DIR)/$(MSD)"; print "  and its xi:included files."; print "  Modify the source files and run make instead."; print "-->"; next}1' > $(TOP_BUILD_DIR)/$(MSD).merged
	$(MICROKIT_TOOL) $(TOP_BUILD_DIR)/$(MSD).merged --search-path $(TOP_BUILD_DIR) --board $(MICROKIT_BOARD) --config $(MICROKIT_CONFIG) -o $(IMAGE_FILE) -r $(REPORT_FILE)


qemu:
	$(QEMU) -machine virt,virtualization=on \
			-cpu cortex-a53 \
			-serial mon:stdio \
			-device loader,file=$(IMAGE_FILE),addr=0x70000000,cpu-num=0 \
			-m size=2G \
			-nographic

clean::
	rm -f *.o

test:: 


clean:: 
	make -C ${CRATES_DIR}/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread clean

verus: 
	make -C ${CRATES_DIR}/domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread verus

verus-sys-proof: 
	make -C ${CRATES_DIR}/sys_proof_nominal all

// Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

pub type sb_event_counter_t = usize;

// Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

pub type microkit_channel = u32;

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

[package]
name = "data"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Verus crate dependencies
#
# It is recommended to use the Verus release:
# https://github.com/verus-lang/verus/releases/tag/release/0.2026.01.23.1650a05
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
vstd = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057", default-features=false }
verus_builtin = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }
verus_builtin_macros = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }

[package.metadata.verus]
verify = true

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

# Verus hooks into rustc internals (rustc-dev, rustc_driver) which change
# nightly-to-nightly with no stability guarantees. The nightly date is pinned
# to match the Verus crate versions in Cargo.toml -- using a later nightly may
# cause compilation failures. If you update the Verus dependencies, update the
# nightly date to match.
# The rustc-dev and rust-src components are required for Verus verification;
# llvm-tools-preview is needed for microkit's no_std linking;
# rust-analyzer provides IDE support (code completion, type hints, etc.).

[toolchain]
channel = "nightly-2026-01-25"
components = [ "rustfmt", "rust-src", "rustc-dev", "llvm-tools-preview", "rust-analyzer" ]

// This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

pub mod domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread_app;

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

[package]
name = "domain_monitor_process_domain_monitor_thread"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
data = { path = "../data" }
linux-raw-sys = { version = "=0.12.0", default-features = false }
log = "0.4.28"

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# seL4 Rust crate dependencies
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
sel4 = { git = "https://github.com/seL4/rust-sel4", features = ["single-threaded"], optional = true, tag="v2.0.0" }
sel4-logging = { git = "https://github.com/seL4/rust-sel4", optional = true, tag="v2.0.0" }

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Verus crate dependencies
#
# It is recommended to use the Verus release:
# https://github.com/verus-lang/verus/releases/tag/release/0.2026.01.23.1650a05
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
vstd = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057", default-features=false }
verus_builtin = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }
verus_builtin_macros = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }


[dev-dependencies]
lazy_static = "1.5.0"
once_cell = "1.21.3"
serial_test = "3.2.0"
proptest = "1.8.0"
env_logger = "0.11.8"

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
crate-type = ["staticlib"]

[features]
sel4 = ["dep:sel4", "dep:sel4-logging" ]

[package.metadata.verus]
verify = true

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

microkit_sdk_config_dir := $(MICROKIT_SDK)/board/$(MICROKIT_BOARD)/$(MICROKIT_CONFIG)

sel4_include_dirs := $(firstword $(wildcard $(microkit_sdk_config_dir)/include \
                                            $(microkit_sdk_config_dir)/debug/include))

ENV_VARS = RUSTC_BOOTSTRAP=1

BUILD_ENV_VARS = $(ENV_VARS) \
                 SEL4_INCLUDE_DIRS=$(abspath $(sel4_include_dirs))

CARGO_FLAGS = -Z build-std=core,alloc,compiler_builtins \
              -Z build-std-features=compiler-builtins-mem \
              --target aarch64-unknown-none

all: build-verus-release

build-verus-release:
	$(BUILD_ENV_VARS) cargo-verus build --features sel4 $(CARGO_FLAGS) --release

build-verus:
	$(BUILD_ENV_VARS) cargo-verus build --features sel4 $(CARGO_FLAGS)

build-release:
	$(BUILD_ENV_VARS) cargo build --features sel4 $(CARGO_FLAGS) --release

build:
	$(BUILD_ENV_VARS) cargo build --features sel4 $(CARGO_FLAGS)

verus:
	$(ENV_VARS) cargo-verus verify $(CARGO_FLAGS)

verus-json:
	$(ENV_VARS) cargo-verus verify $(CARGO_FLAGS) -- --output-json --time > verus_results.json

# Test Example:
#   Run all unit tests
#   Usage: make test
#
#   Run only unit tests whose name contains 'proptest'
#   Usage: make test args=proptest

test-release:
	cargo test $(args) --release

test:
	cargo test $(args)

# Coverage Example:
#   Generate a test coverage report combining the results of all unit tests
#   Usage: make coverage
#
#   Generate a test coverage report for unit tests whose name contains 'proptest'
#   Usage: make coverage args=proptest

coverage:
	cargo install grcov
	@exists=0; if [ -f target/coverage/report/index.html ]; then exists=1; fi; \
	rm -rf target/coverage; \
	CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 RUSTFLAGS='-Cinstrument-coverage' LLVM_PROFILE_FILE='target/coverage/cargo-test-%p-%m.profraw' \
	cargo test $(args); \
	grcov . --binary-path ./target/debug/deps/ -s . -t html --branch --ignore-not-existing -o target/coverage/report; \
	if [ $$exists -eq 0 ]; then open target/coverage/report/index.html; fi

clean:
	cargo clean

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

# Verus hooks into rustc internals (rustc-dev, rustc_driver) which change
# nightly-to-nightly with no stability guarantees. The nightly date is pinned
# to match the Verus crate versions in Cargo.toml -- using a later nightly may
# cause compilation failures. If you update the Verus dependencies, update the
# nightly date to match.
# The rustc-dev and rust-src components are required for Verus verification;
# llvm-tools-preview is needed for microkit's no_std linking;
# rust-analyzer provides IDE support (code completion, type hints, etc.).

[toolchain]
channel = "nightly-2026-01-25"
components = [ "rustfmt", "rust-src", "rustc-dev", "llvm-tools-preview", "rust-analyzer" ]

      <program_image path="tsp_tst.elf" />

           vaddr="0x10_000_000"
           perms="rw"

      />

      <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER tsp_tst -->

      <program_image path="tcp_tct.elf" />
      <map mr="TempControlSystem_Instance_tsp_tst_currentTemp_1_Memory_Region"
           vaddr="0x10_000_000"
           perms="r"
           setvar_vaddr="currentTemp_queue_1"
      />
      <map mr="TempControlSystem_Instance_tcp_tct_fanCmd_1_Memory_Region"
           vaddr="0x10_001_000"
           perms="rw"

      />
      <map mr="TempControlSystem_Instance_tcp_tct_setPoint_1_Memory_Region"

      />

      />
      <map mr="TempControlSystem_Instance_fp_ft_fanAck_1_Memory_Region"

  <memory_region name="TempControlSystem_Instance_tsp_tst_currentTemp_1_Memory_Region"

                 size="0x1_000" />

  <channel>
    <end pd="pacer" id="61" />
